Class Radio.BridgedJavaSoundAudioDevice

java.lang.Object
javazoom.jl.player.AudioDeviceBase
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.Radio.BridgedJavaSoundAudioDevice
All Implemented Interfaces:
javazoom.jl.player.AudioDevice
Enclosing class:
Radio
private static class Radio.BridgedJavaSoundAudioDevice extends javazoom.jl.player.AudioDeviceBase
A specialized JLayer-to-JavaSound bridge that routes streams to a specific AudioDevice. Ported from JavaSoundAudioDevice (LGPL) to bypass private field restrictions and rigid hardware discovery.
Author:
anahata

    The active JavaSound source data line.

      Reusable buffer for byte conversion.

  • Constructor Details

    • BridgedJavaSoundAudioDevice

      public BridgedJavaSoundAudioDevice(AudioDevice hardwareDevice)
      Constructs a new bridged audio device for the specified hardware device.
      Parameters:
      hardwareDevice - the target hardware audio device

  • Method Details

    • openImpl

      protected void openImpl() throws javazoom.jl.decoder.JavaLayerException

      Implementation details: No-op. Hardware initialization is deferred until createSource() to ensure thread-safety during stream establishment.

      Overrides:
      openImpl in class javazoom.jl.player.AudioDeviceBase
      Throws:
      javazoom.jl.decoder.JavaLayerException

    • createSource

      protected void createSource() throws javazoom.jl.decoder.JavaLayerException
      Establishes the JavaSound source line matching the decoder's output frequency and channel count. Opens and starts the line for real-time playback.
      Throws:
      javazoom.jl.decoder.JavaLayerException - if the hardware line cannot be obtained.

    • writeImpl

      protected void writeImpl(short[] samples, int offs, int len) throws javazoom.jl.decoder.JavaLayerException

      Implementation details: Lazily creates the source line if needed and writes the decoded PCM samples to the hardware buffer.

      Overrides:
      writeImpl in class javazoom.jl.player.AudioDeviceBase
      Throws:
      javazoom.jl.decoder.JavaLayerException

    • toByteArray

      protected byte[] toByteArray(short[] samples, int offs, int len)
      Converts short samples into a little-endian byte array for JavaSound consumption. Manages internal buffer resizing to prevent allocations during playback.
      Parameters:
      samples - The raw PCM samples.
      offs - Buffer offset.
      len - Number of samples.
      Returns:
      The converted byte buffer.

    • closeImpl

      protected void closeImpl()

      Implementation details: Safely stops and releases the hardware line to allow other applications access to the audio device.

      Overrides:
      closeImpl in class javazoom.jl.player.AudioDeviceBase

    • flushImpl

      protected void flushImpl()

      Implementation details: Drains the remaining audio from the hardware buffer before finishing.

      Overrides:
      flushImpl in class javazoom.jl.player.AudioDeviceBase

    • getPosition

      public int getPosition()

      Implementation details: Returns the current microsecond position of the source line converted to milliseconds.
